projects.title: Wakala OS
projects.description: Automation operating system for agentic workflows, structured business process automation, reporting, onboarding, and dependable operations.
projects.challenge: Operational teams need automation that remains accountable, auditable, and easy to operate after launch.
projects.solution: Wakala OS structures workflows around ownership, escalation, reporting, and governed execution.

projects.title: TendaNow
projects.description: MVP-stage accountability platform making goal achievement accessible through a WhatsApp-first architecture with multilingual support for African users.
projects.challenge: Goal-support tools often miss users who live primarily inside messaging platforms and multilingual contexts.
projects.solution: TendaNow brings accountability coaching into familiar communication flows with culturally aware support.

projects.title: CodeCrusher
projects.description: Semantic code intelligence platform for enterprise teams that need architecture visibility, pattern discovery, and systematic technical-debt reduction.
projects.challenge: Large codebases hide duplicated patterns, architectural drift, and refactoring risk behind surface-level syntax.
projects.solution: CodeCrusher analyzes code intent and architecture patterns so teams can understand systems before changing them.

projects.title: BizGen
projects.description: Multilingual business intelligence platform for concept generation, entrepreneurial development, and early market validation.
projects.challenge: Early-stage founders need practical market signal, concept structure, and validation support before committing major resources.
projects.solution: BizGen helps founders move from broad ideas to clearer market hypotheses, business structure, and validation paths.
